вЂЋ SYNOPSISвЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ

It should have been clear from the start that Aventurine had let you win every game, each loss carefully orchestrated. He had been testing you, observing your skill, your confidence, and your reactions, all while keeping his own thoughts and intentions behind that flawless charm.

But the true purpose of the night was only just beginning. This time, the stakes were far higher than money, far more intimate, and far more personal.

Would you rise to the challenge, or would the weight of the gamble prove too tempting to resist?
